nasb.text: “Behold, I am against you, O arrogant one,” Declares the Lord God of hosts, “For your day has come, The time when I will punish you.

esv.text: “Behold, I am against you, O proud one, declares the Lord God of hosts, for your day has come, the time when I will punish you.

cnv.text: “傲慢的人哪！我必敵對你 ， 因為你的日子，就是我懲罰你的時候，來到了。

ccb.text: “主——万军之耶和华说， ‘狂傲的人啊，我要与你为敌， 我惩罚你的时候到了。
